markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content publishing blockers and resolve technical SEO issues.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Blocked:** 12 new articles and an unknown number of older drafts are ready but lack images, preventing publication.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [**Image Workflow Resolved:** GrowthX will now add images directly to the CMS staging environment, unblocking the publishing queue.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Plan:** A plan was set to fix Google Search Console errors (404s, crawl budget waste) via redirects, sitemap updates, and a `robots.txt` file.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [**2026 Goal Defined:** The primary objective is to drive signups and demo requests, with a target 50/50 split between self-serve and sales-assisted leads.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Blockers

  - [**Problem:** Articles are ready but cannot be published without images.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [**New Articles:** 12 drafts are ready for review in the Airtable interface.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**Older Drafts:** An unknown number of articles imported in December also lack images.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will now add images directly to the CMS staging environment, unblocking the publishing process.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This bypasses the previous workflow of sharing images in Google Docs, which was inefficient for review and upload.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [**Image Quality:** AI-generated images have minor "sketchy elements" due to current AI limitations. Vizcom will review them and can request alternatives.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** GrowthX will set up an auto-alert in the shared Slack channel when articles are staged, ensuring Vizcom has immediate visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)

### Technical SEO & Indexing

  - [**Problem:** Google Search Console (GSC) shows indexing errors, wasting crawl budget and hurting visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [**Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Expected:** Redirects from the recent site migration are normal.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Critical:** 404 "Not Found" errors must be fixed with redirects to prevent crawl budget waste.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [**New Pages:** New pages (e.g., University courses) require manual URL inspection in GSC to prompt faster indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Redirects:** Implement 301 redirects for all 404 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [**Sitemap:** Verify if the sitemap is dynamic; if not, new pages must be added manually.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
      - **`robots.txt`:** Update the file to disallow crawling of low-value pages (e.g., URLs with `?` or `#`), focusing crawl budget on important content.
      - [**Technical Audit:** GrowthX will run a Screaming Frog audit to identify and prioritize 3-4 urgent post-migration fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Performance Tracking & Goals

  - [**Tooling:**](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
      - [**Looker Studio:** The existing dashboard tracks organic and referral traffic, updating weekly. Vizcom will receive access.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
      - [**CheckThat:** GrowthX's proprietary AEO tracking platform. GrowthX will provide reporting; direct team access is an extra cost.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [**2026 North Star Goal:** Drive signups and demo requests.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [**Target Split:** 50/50 or 60/40 between self-serve signups and sales-assisted demo requests.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
      - [**Key Metric:** Prove the ROI of non-branded content to justify investment.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [**GrowthX Support:** GrowthX will pull baseline data and keyword recommendations to support the non-branded content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
      - [Add images to the CMS staging environment for all 12 ready-to-publish articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
      - [Set up a Slack alert for when articles are staged.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
      - [Create a "Technical" folder in the shared drive with implementation guides for `robots.txt`, sitemaps, and structured data.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [Update the `robots.txt` file to disallow crawling of low-value pages.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
      - [Share the Looker Studio dashboard link with Vizcom.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
      - [Demo the CheckThat platform next week.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [**Vizcom:**](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [Review the 12 staged articles and publish them.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=2118.0)
      - [Provide specific quarterly/yearly targets for signups and demo requests.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
      - [Ask the Off-brand agency to confirm if the sitemap is dynamic.](https://fathom.video/share/xPiB-HyzhCqDr4sqzL7pR3EsK1JCTM5B?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
